name: Golf IN
about: Golf In is an indoor golf simulator venue in Twin Falls, Idaho, offering a complete golfing experience regardless of weather conditions. The facility features state-of-the-art simulators where players can train, play, and prepare their golf game using their own clubs or renting provided equipment. Golf In provides various membership options and hourly rental rates to accommodate different levels of play and commitment, from casual practice to serious training. The venue emphasizes an all-season approach to golf, allowing enthusiasts, novices, and professionals to focus on their game without external interruptions like rain, wind, or dusk.
why_golfers_like_it: No off-season golfing availability regardless of weather conditions
State-of-the-art simulators for focused training and play
Flexible options including hourly rentals and memberships
Ability to use personal clubs or rent on-site equipment

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site
No mention of alcohol service available on-site

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or rent some of theirs for an additional fee.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or alcohol service on-site, so it appears to be BYOB.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time to complete 18 holes, as this can vary depending on simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly state if it's kid-friendly, but it mentions 'novice' players and offers club rentals, suggesting it accommodates various skill levels including juniors.
